451.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding what Hafsa bint Abd al-Rahman was asked about menstruation and the manner of approaching one's wife after menstruation. She was embarrassed to ask but sought clarification from the scholarly women about the correct rulings.
451.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai apa yang ditanyakan kepada Hafsha binti Abdurrahman tentang haid dan cara mendatangi istri setelah haid. Dia malu untuk bertanya tetapi mencari klarifikasi dari wanita yang berpengetahuan tentang hukum yang benar.

452.iwh_en: It was narrated that a scholar said: 'I reviewed the Quran with Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) three times, stopping at every verse to ask him about when and why it was revealed. When I came to the verse "They ask you about menstruation," I asked and he explained the rulings on approaching wives after menstruation.'
452.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang ulama berkata: 'Aku mengkaji Al-Quran bersama Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) tiga kali, berhenti di setiap ayat untuk bertanya kepadanya tentang kapan dan mengapa ayat itu diturunkan. Ketika aku sampai pada ayat "Mereka bertanya kepadamu tentang haid," aku bertanya dan dia menjelaskan hukum mendatangi istri setelah haid.'

453.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sufyan that he said regarding the verse: 'They were commanded to approach from where they were forbidden' — meaning after menstruation ends, intercourse is allowed in the normal way.
453.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sufyan bahwa dia berkata mengenai ayat: 'Mereka diperintahkan untuk mendatangi dari tempat mereka dilarang' — artinya setelah haid berakhir, hubungan intim diperbolehkan dengan cara yang normal.

454.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sufyan that he said regarding the verse on menstruation: 'From the direction of purity' — meaning from the front, the normal place of intercourse.
454.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sufyan bahwa dia berkata mengenai ayat tentang haid: 'Dari arah kesucian' — artinya dari depan, tempat normal hubungan intim.

455.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said: 'By Allah, it is the vagina' — clarifying that the permissible place of intercourse after menstruation is the vagina, not elsewhere.
455.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata: 'Demi Allah, itu adalah kemaluan wanita' — menjelaskan bahwa tempat hubungan intim yang diizinkan setelah haid adalah kemaluan, bukan tempat lain.

456.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said: 'It is only the vagina' — affirming that intercourse is restricted to the natural place.
456.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata: 'Itu hanya kemaluan wanita' — menegaskan bahwa hubungan intim dibatasi pada tempat yang alami.

457.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan that he said: 'The Jews would spare no effort in making things difficult for Muslims. They used to say: "O Companions of Muhammad, by Allah it is not permissible to approach your wives from the front during menstruation." So the Companions asked the Prophet ﷺ about this and the verse of menstruation was revealed.'
457.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan bahwa dia berkata: 'Orang-orang Yahudi tidak menyia-nyiakan kesempatan untuk mempersulit kaum Muslim. Mereka biasa berkata: "Wahai para Sahabat Muhammad, demi Allah tidak diperbolehkan mendatangi istri-istrimu dari depan saat haid." Maka para Sahabat bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang hal ini dan ayat haid pun turun.'

458.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he said: 'He may approach her from the front or from behind, as long as it is in the permissible place' — meaning the vagina.
458.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa dia berkata: 'Dia boleh mendatanginya dari depan atau dari belakang, selama itu di tempat yang diizinkan' — yaitu kemaluan wanita.

459.iwh_en: It was narrated that in the time of pre-Islamic ignorance, people would treat menstruating women like the Zoroastrians did — completely avoiding them. This was mentioned to the Prophet ﷺ, and the verse 'They ask you about menstruation' was revealed, establishing a moderate middle path.
459.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa pada masa jahiliyah, orang-orang memperlakukan wanita yang sedang haid seperti yang dilakukan orang Zoroaster — menghindari mereka sepenuhnya. Hal ini disebutkan kepada Nabi ﷺ, dan ayat 'Mereka bertanya kepadamu tentang haid' turun, menetapkan jalan tengah yang moderat.

460.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said regarding the word 'harm' in the verse about menstruation: 'It is the blood' — meaning the harm referred to in the verse is the blood of menstruation.
460.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata mengenai kata 'kesakitan' dalam ayat tentang haid: 'Itu adalah darah' — artinya kesakitan yang dimaksud dalam ayat adalah darah haid.

461.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said regarding the word 'harm' in the menstruation verse: 'It is impure' — meaning menstrual blood is impure.
461.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata mengenai kata 'kesakitan' dalam ayat haid: 'Itu adalah najis' — artinya darah haid adalah najis.

462.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'id ibn al-Musayyab regarding the verse 'Your wives are a tilth for you, so approach your tilth as you will': he interpreted it as approaching from the front or back in the natural place of intercourse.
462.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'id ibn al-Musayyab mengenai ayat 'Istri-istri kalian adalah ladang bagi kalian, maka datangilah ladang kalian dari mana saja kalian kehendaki': dia menafsirkannya sebagai mendatangi dari depan atau belakang di tempat alami hubungan intim.

463.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said regarding the Quranic verse about approaching one's wife: 'However you wish — meaning in the vagina' — clarifying that 'however you wish' refers to position, not place.
463.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata mengenai ayat Quran tentang mendatangi istri: 'Bagaimanapun kalian kehendaki — artinya di kemaluan wanita' — menjelaskan bahwa 'bagaimanapun kalian kehendaki' merujuk pada posisi, bukan tempat.

464.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Jews used to say that if a man approaches his wife from behind, the child would be cross-eyed. Then the Quranic verse was revealed: 'Your wives are a tilth for you, so approach your tilth as you will' — clarifying that different positions are permissible as long as intercourse is in the vagina.
464.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa orang-orang Yahudi biasa berkata bahwa jika seorang pria mendatangi istrinya dari belakang, anak itu akan juling. Kemudian ayat Quran turun: 'Istri-istri kalian adalah ladang bagi kalian, maka datangilah ladang kalian dari mana saja kalian kehendaki' — menjelaskan bahwa berbagai posisi diperbolehkan selama hubungan intim di kemaluan wanita.

465.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said: 'He may come to his wife however he wishes — standing, sitting, facing her or from behind' — clarifying that all positions are permissible as long as intercourse is in the proper place.
465.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata: 'Dia boleh mendatangi istrinya bagaimanapun dia inginkan — berdiri, duduk, menghadapnya atau dari belakang' — menjelaskan bahwa semua posisi diperbolehkan selama hubungan intim di tempat yang tepat.

466.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'id al-Ashajj that he said regarding the verse 'approach your tilth as you will': 'In the vagina' — meaning the phrase 'as you will' refers to position, not place.
466.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'id al-Asyajj bahwa dia berkata mengenai ayat 'datangilah ladang kalian dari mana saja kalian kehendaki': 'Di kemaluan wanita' — artinya frasa 'dari mana saja kalian kehendaki' merujuk pada posisi, bukan tempat.

467.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said: 'Whoever comes to his wife in her anus, she is to him like the man to a man — then he recited the verse "They ask you about menstruation, say: It is harm"' — indicating that anal intercourse is as forbidden as homosexuality.
467.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata: 'Barangsiapa mendatangi istrinya di duburnya, dia baginya seperti pria kepada pria — kemudian dia membacakan ayat "Mereka bertanya kepadamu tentang haid, katakanlah: Itu adalah kesakitan"' — menunjukkan bahwa hubungan intim melalui dubur sama terlarangnya dengan homoseksualitas.

468.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever approaches a menstruating woman, or a woman in her anus, or goes to a fortune-teller and believes what he says — he has disbelieved in what was revealed to Muhammad ﷺ.'
468.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa mendatangi wanita yang sedang haid, atau wanita melalui duburnya, atau pergi kepada dukun dan mempercayai apa yang dia katakan — dia telah kafir terhadap apa yang diturunkan kepada Muhammad ﷺ.'

469.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man came to Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) and said: 'O Abu Abd al-Rahman, may I approach my wife wherever I wish?' He said: 'Yes.' He said: 'And from wherever I wish?' He said again: 'Yes.' The man was asking about various positions, and Ibn Mas'ud confirmed all positions in the vagina are permissible.
469.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang pria datang kepada Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dan berkata: 'Wahai Abu Abdurrahman, bolehkah aku mendatangi istriku dari mana saja yang aku inginkan?' Dia berkata: 'Ya.' Pria itu berkata: 'Dan dari mana saja yang aku inginkan?' Dia berkata lagi: 'Ya.' Pria itu bertanya tentang berbagai posisi, dan Ibn Mas'ud mengkonfirmasi bahwa semua posisi di kemaluan wanita diperbolehkan.

470.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he used to dislike a man approaching his wife in her anus.
470.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa dia tidak menyukai seorang pria mendatangi istrinya melalui duburnya.

471.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said: 'No male approached another male until the people of Lot' — indicating that anal intercourse was introduced by the people of Lot and is forbidden.
471.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata: 'Tidak ada pria yang mendatangi pria lain hingga datangnya kaum Luth' — menunjukkan bahwa hubungan intim melalui dubur diperkenalkan oleh kaum Luth dan diharamkan.

472.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said: 'Whoever approaches his wife in her anus — Allah the Exalted will not look at him on the Day of Resurrection.'
472.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata: 'Barangsiapa mendatangi istrinya melalui duburnya — Allah Ta'ala tidak akan melihatnya pada Hari Kiamat.'

473.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When one of you breaks his wudu during prayer, he should leave, perform ablution, and then pray.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ also said regarding this matter.
473.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang Sahabat bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian berhadats dalam shalat, dia harus pergi, berwudhu, dan kemudian shalat.' Rasulullah ﷺ juga bersabda mengenai hal ini.

474.iwh_en: It was narrated that someone asked Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him): 'What do you say about slave girls when I practice withdrawal?' He said: 'What is withdrawal?' When the narrator mentioned the anus, Ibn Umar said: 'Does anyone really do that?' — expressing strong disapproval.
474.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seseorang bertanya kepada Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu): 'Apa pendapatmu tentang budak perempuan ketika aku melakukan azl?' Dia berkata: 'Apa itu azl?' Ketika perawi menyebutkan dubur, Ibn Umar berkata: 'Apakah ada yang benar-benar melakukan itu?' — mengungkapkan penolakan keras.

475.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzaymah ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbid approaching women in their anuses' — during a discussion about what is permitted with women.
475.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzaimah ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ melarang mendatangi wanita melalui dubur mereka' — selama diskusi tentang apa yang diperbolehkan dengan wanita.

476.iwh_en: It was narrated that people used to avoid women during menstruation and approach them from behind. They asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about this and the verse was revealed: 'Your wives are a tilth for you, so approach your tilth as you will' — indicating approaching from behind in the vagina is permissible, but anal intercourse is not.
476.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa orang-orang biasa menghindari wanita saat haid dan mendatangi mereka dari belakang. Mereka bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang hal ini dan ayat turun: 'Istri-istri kalian adalah ladang bagi kalian, maka datangilah ladang kalian dari mana saja kalian kehendaki' — menunjukkan mendatangi dari belakang melalui kemaluan wanita diperbolehkan, tetapi hubungan intim melalui dubur tidak.

477.iwh_en: It was narrated from Tawus, Sa'id, Mujahid, and Ata that they all interpreted the Quranic verse on approaching wives as permitting intercourse in the vagina from any direction or position, but forbidding anal intercourse.
477.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Thawus, Sa'id, Mujahid, dan Atha bahwa mereka semua menafsirkan ayat Quran tentang mendatangi istri sebagai mengizinkan hubungan intim melalui kemaluan dari arah atau posisi mana saja, tetapi melarang hubungan intim melalui dubur.

478.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ata and al-Zuhri that they both said: 'The ghusl from janabah and from menstruation are the same' — meaning both require the same type of full body washing.
478.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Atha dan al-Zuhri bahwa keduanya berkata: 'Mandi dari janabah dan dari haid adalah sama' — artinya keduanya memerlukan jenis pencucian seluruh tubuh yang sama.

479.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said to his wife: 'Run your fingers through your hair with water before the Fire runs through it — and it has little mercy on it' — warning her about the punishment for not properly washing the hair during ghusl.
479.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata kepada istrinya: 'Jalankan jari-jarimu melalui rambutmu dengan air sebelum Api menjalar melaluinya — dan api itu sedikit belas kasihan padanya' — memperingatkannya tentang siksa karena tidak membasuh rambut dengan benar saat mandi.

480.iwh_en: It was narrated that someone entered with his mother and aunt upon Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her). One of them asked: 'How do you perform ghusl?' She said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would pour water three times over his head, then wash the rest of his body. She would pour water over her head and let it reach the roots of her hair.'
480.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seseorang masuk bersama ibu dan bibinya menemui Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha). Salah satu dari mereka bertanya: 'Bagaimana engkau mandi?' Dia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menuangkan air tiga kali ke atas kepalanya, kemudian mencuci sisa tubuhnya. Dia menuangkan air ke atas kepalanya dan membiarkannya mencapai akar rambutnya.'

481.iwh_en: It was narrated from a narrator who said to Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that she said: 'Amazing! And even if she spent an uqiyyah on it? It is sufficient for her to pour water over her head three times' — indicating that elaborate hair washing during ghusl is not required.
481.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang perawi yang berkata kepada Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata: 'Menakjubkan! Dan meskipun dia menghabiskan satu uqiyah untuk itu? Cukup baginya menuangkan air ke atas kepalanya tiga kali' — menunjukkan bahwa mencuci rambut secara rumit saat mandi tidak diperlukan.

482.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said regarding women's hair during ghusl: 'She should comb through it with her fingers' — meaning she should run her fingers through the hair to ensure water reaches the roots.
482.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata mengenai rambut wanita saat mandi: 'Dia harus menyisirnya dengan jari-jarinya' — artinya dia harus menjalankan jari-jarinya melalui rambut untuk memastikan air mencapai akarnya.

483.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the menstruating woman and the one in a state of janabah: 'They should immerse themselves in water' or similar wording about how to perform ghusl.
483.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) mengenai wanita yang sedang haid dan orang yang dalam keadaan janabah: 'Mereka harus mencelupkan diri ke dalam air' atau kata-kata serupa tentang cara melakukan mandi.

484.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim al-Nakha'i that he said: 'If she wets the roots and tips of her hair, she does not need to undo it' — meaning she does not need to unbraid her hair for ghusl as long as water reaches the roots.
484.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim al-Nakha'i bahwa dia berkata: 'Jika dia membasahi akar dan ujung rambutnya, dia tidak perlu menguraikanya' — artinya dia tidak perlu mengurai kepangan rambutnya untuk mandi selama air mencapai akarnya.

485.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nafi' that the wives of Ibn Umar and his slave mothers, when they performed ghusl, would loosen their braids and let water reach the roots of their hair.
485.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nafi' bahwa istri-istri Ibn Umar dan ibu-ibu dari anak-anak budaknya, ketika mandi, akan melepas kepangan mereka dan membiarkan air mencapai akar rambut mereka.

486.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman that she said: 'They should not undo their braids for menstruation or for janabah' — indicating that if water can reach the roots without undoing the hair, it is sufficient.
486.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita bahwa dia berkata: 'Mereka tidak perlu mengurai kepangan mereka untuk haid maupun untuk janabah' — menunjukkan bahwa jika air dapat mencapai akar tanpa mengurai rambut, itu sudah cukup.

487.iwh_en: It was narrated that someone was told: 'Pour three handfuls over your head, then press firmly after each handful' — instructions on how to perform ghusl effectively.
487.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seseorang diberitahu: 'Tuangkan tiga genggam ke atas kepalamu, kemudian tekan dengan kuat setelah setiap genggam' — petunjuk tentang cara melakukan mandi secara efektif.

488.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he told his wife: 'Pour water over the roots of your hair' — instructing her on the proper method of washing the hair during ghusl.
488.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia memberitahu istrinya: 'Tuangkan air ke akar rambutmu' — menginstruksikannya tentang metode yang tepat untuk mencuci rambut saat mandi.

489.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfah (may Allah be pleased with him) through another chain that he told his wife to pour water over the roots of her hair during ghusl.
489.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui sanad lain bahwa dia memberitahu istrinya untuk menuangkan air ke akar rambutnya saat mandi.

490.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'When a woman performs ghusl from janabah, she should not undo her hair but should pour water over the roots and wet it' — meaning it is sufficient to wet the roots without undoing the hair.
490.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata: 'Ketika seorang wanita mandi dari janabah, dia tidak perlu mengurai rambutnya tetapi harus menuangkan air ke akar dan membasahinya' — artinya cukup untuk membasahi akar tanpa mengurai rambut.

491.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abd al-Malik that he said: 'No, but she should pour water over her head abundantly until the roots of the hair are saturated' — regarding whether women must undo their hair during ghusl.
491.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abd al-Malik bahwa dia berkata: 'Tidak, tetapi dia harus menuangkan air ke atas kepalanya secara berlimpah hingga akar rambut jenuh' — mengenai apakah wanita harus mengurai rambut mereka saat mandi.

492.iwh_en: It was narrated that Aisha, Mother of the Believers (may Allah be pleased with her) said: 'Is it not possible for one of you, when you purify yourself from your menstruation, to use some qust (a fragrant wood) and then rub the area where the blood was?' — instructing on using perfume after the post-menstrual ghusl.
492.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Aisyah, Ummul Mukminin (radhiyallahu 'anha) berkata: 'Bukankah mungkin bagi salah satu dari kalian, ketika bersuci dari haid, untuk menggunakan sedikit qust (kayu wewangian) dan kemudian mengusap area tempat darah berada?' — menginstruksikan tentang penggunaan wewangian setelah mandi pasca-haid.

493.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When a woman performs ghusl from menstruation, she should apply perfume to the trace of the blood.'
493.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dia berkata: 'Ketika seorang wanita mandi dari haid, dia harus mengoleskan wewangian pada bekas darah.'

494.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that his wives and slave mothers, when performing ghusl from menstruation, would not undo their braids, but would ensure water reached the roots.
494.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa istri-istrinya dan ibu-ibu dari anak-anak budaknya, ketika mandi dari haid, tidak mengurai kepangan mereka, tetapi memastikan air mencapai akar rambut.

495.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said: 'There is no harm in a menstruating woman reaching in from the mosque to take something' — meaning she may reach her hand inside the mosque without entering it.
495.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata: 'Tidak mengapa jika wanita yang sedang haid meraih dari masjid untuk mengambil sesuatu' — artinya dia boleh memasukkan tangannya ke dalam masjid tanpa memasukinya.

496.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said: 'The menstruating woman may reach in to take something from the mosque, but she may not enter it.'
496.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata: 'Wanita yang sedang haid boleh meraih untuk mengambil sesuatu dari masjid, tetapi dia tidak boleh memasukinya.'

497.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said: 'The one in a state of janabah may take something from the mosque but should not leave anything in it' — indicating the junub person may not enter the mosque but may reach in briefly.
497.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata: 'Orang yang dalam keadaan janabah boleh mengambil sesuatu dari masjid tetapi tidak boleh menaruh sesuatu di dalamnya' — menunjukkan bahwa orang yang junub tidak boleh masuk masjid tetapi boleh meraih sebentar.

498.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who said: 'Yes — except for the Quran' — meaning the junub person may take things from the mosque except for the Quran, which requires tahara to touch.
498.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang berkata: 'Ya — kecuali Al-Quran' — artinya orang yang junub boleh mengambil benda dari masjid kecuali Al-Quran, yang memerlukan taharah untuk disentuh.

499.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) regarding who may pass through the mosque while in a state of janabah: 'He is the traveler' — meaning the verse allowing passing through the mosque while junub (4:43) refers to the traveler who has no way to perform ghusl.
499.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) mengenai siapa yang boleh lewat melalui masjid dalam keadaan janabah: 'Dia adalah musafir' — artinya ayat yang mengizinkan lewat melalui masjid saat junub (4:43) merujuk kepada musafir yang tidak memiliki cara untuk mandi.

500.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The one in a state of janabah may pass through the mosque but should not sit in it.'
500.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata: 'Orang yang dalam keadaan janabah boleh lewat melalui masjid tetapi tidak boleh duduk di dalamnya.'
